item.super_source_block.empty_item_sourc: Accepts 1024 of one item type (configurable) then transforms
jei.super_source_block.empty_fluid_sourc: Accepts one fluid type only. Fill it with the configured amount (default: 256 buckets) to upgrade.
jei.super_source_block.super_fluid_sourc: Upgraded fluid source with massive output and capacity. Keeps block entity NBT when broken.
jei.super_source_block.empty_item_source: Accepts one item type only. Insert the configured amount (default: 1024 items) to upgrade.
jei.super_source_block.super_item_source: Upgraded item source with massive output. Keeps block entity NBT when broken.
super_source_block.info.mekanism_not_loa: Mekanism not detected, gas handling disabled
